arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel mocks Man Utd transfer target during Champions League heroics
arts.sum: Arsenal went up against one of their top transfer targets in the form of Viktor Gyokeres in the Champions League on Tuesday night - and it was the Gunners who came out on top

arts.ttl: Sporting Lisbon 1-5 Arsenal: Mikel Arteta's side get back to winning ways in Europe as hosts fall to heavy defeat in first Champions League match without Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING AT ESTADIO JOSE ALVALADE: Plenty of goals? Check. Confidence restored? Check again. A performance to make rivals cast anxious glance Yes, that too.

arts.ttl: Man Utd wonderkid to sign contract THIS WEEK
arts.sum: While Man Utd are planning to hand Obi-Martin his first professional contract, the Red Devils are also monitoring several transfer targets across Europe. Chido Obi-Martin is set to sign his first professional contract at Manchester United when he turns 17 on Friday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye Napoli's Kvaratskhelia - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Napoli might sell Manchester United target Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Real Madrid target Tottenham's Pedro Porro and Brighton make Evan Ferguson available for loan, plus more.

arts.ttl: UEFA Youth League: AZ Alkmaar defeat Manchester United
arts.sum: In the UEFA Youth League, AZ Alkmaar’s U19s defeated Manchester United 2-1 on Tuesday evening. AZ Alkmaar need to overcome Manchester United over two legs to reach the knockout stages of the competition. AZ got off to a bad start as Jeremiah Esajas netted an own goal to put the visitors ahead but midfielder Yoël […] The post UEFA Youth League: AZ Alkmaar defeat Manchester United appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Man Utd wonderkid 'on track to make history' after impressing Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has already been impressed by one of the club's most promising young prospects, who could now go on to make history in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Sporting make familiar Ruben Amorim mistake in Champions League clash with Arsenal
arts.sum: Sporting hosted Arsenal in the Champions League on Tuesday evening in what was their first European game since the exit of Ruben Amorim, who has taken charge of Manchester United

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand tells Viktor Gyokeres to reunite with Ruben Amorim at Man United - as he insists the Sporting Lisbon striker isn't in 'the top bracket' yet
arts.sum: The Swede, who has scored 23 goals in 18 games for Sporting this season, has become one of Europe's most sought after stars following his displays in Portugal.

arts.ttl: Victor Boniface expected to REJECT Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly eager to sign Bayer Leverkusen forward Victor Boniface in 2025, but the Nigeria international is expected to reject a transfer to Old Trafford. Joshua Zirkzee has been touted to leave Old Trafford in 2025, after a dismal start to life in the Premier League, and Man Utd have shortlisted Boniface as one possible replacement option.
